templates.name: Simple Tracker
templates.description: Track anything with a form, list, and optional charts. Add, edit, and delete items.

templates.name: Survey / Feedback
templates.description: Collect responses with a form and view aggregate results with charts.

templates.name: Daily Log
templates.description: A journal for date-based entries — write, browse, and edit. Great for diaries, standups, or gratitude logs.

templates.name: Scoreboard
templates.description: Track scores and rankings for people or teams with charts and summary stats.
